prompt: Please compare titles TTL-6869 and TTL-9869; report each name, hold-until date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. In the final recap, give the target ID first, original hold-until date second, and corrected hold-until date third.

follow_up_turns.content: For Lanterns at Noon (TTL-6869) only, set the hold-until date to 2026-11-18. Leave TTL-9869 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for TTL-6869: set the hold-until date to 2026-12-22, not 2026-11-18. The other title must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first hold-until date.
Replace the superseded hold-until date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both hold-until date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected hold-until date as current and the first requested hold-until date as superseded.
The final recap must present these items in order: target ID; original hold-until date; corrected hold-until date.
